event: The Pines of the Ile St. Morah
description: An impressionist landscape painting showing a grove of tall pine trees with twisting trunks and spreading canopies. The trees grow on a grassy hillside, through which a glimpse of blue water is visible. Dappled sunlight filters through the foliage, creating a lively play of light and shadow. The palette is dominated by various greens, with touches of blue water and pale sky. The brushwork is loose and vigorous, characteristic of late 19th-century plein-air painting.

_meta.title: The Pines of the Ile St. Morah
